title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 108.050 - Notice of election
text:
108.050.  Notice of election. — The notice shall state the time and purpose of the election and the amount of indebtedness to be incurred.
(RSMo 1939 § 3293, A.L. 1945 p. 597 § 3296, A.L. 1978 H.B. 971) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 2906; 1919 § 1054; 1909 § 1261
